name: Salmon with Chive & Herb Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-12 inch frying pan over high heat, bring broth, tarragon, and thyme to a boil.
2. Lay salmon in the pan and reduce heat to simmering; cover the pan. Cook until fish is opaque but still moist-looking in the thickest part (cut to test), about 10-15 minutes.
3. Lift steaks onto a platter; cover and keep warm.
4. Add garlic to the pan; boil on high heat, uncovered, until liquid is reduced to 1/2 cup, 3-4 minutes.
5. Mix the cornstarch with 2 tbsp of water and stir into the pan; stir until boiling.
6. Mix in chives and pour sauce over the salmon.
7. Season servings individually with salt, pepper, and juice from the lemon wedges.
